reason: Successfully navigated to agent, verified idle status, sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?", and verified agent responded with "4" in under 3 minutes.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Super Agent application home page with three agents listed in the sidebar.
Found the "QA-20260417-234018-llpx" agent in the sidebar - Located the agent in the sidebar list marked with "idle" status.
Clicked the "QA-20260417-234018-llpx" agent - Successfully opened the agent detail page showing the agent name in the header and agent status as "idle".
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Confirmed agent status is "idle" which satisfies the requirement.
Clicked on the message input textbox - Successfully focused the textbox with placeholder text "How can I help? Press cmd+enter to send".
Typed the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Successfully entered the message text into the input field and the Send button became enabled.
Clicked the Send button - Successfully sent the message, creating a new session "Basic Math Question Session" and navigating to the chat view.
Waited for agent response - Agent responded in approximately 2 seconds (well under the 3-minute timeout).
Verified the response mentions "4" - Agent responded with the single message "4" which is the correct answer and clearly mentions the required number.
